title: Pleural Fluid Analysis: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
our provider thinks the fluid may quickly build up again, a special tube, called a catheter, may be inserted when your pleural fluid sample is taken. The tube will be left in place to let the fluid drain out of your body. If pleural fluid stops building up, the tube may be removed.
Other treatments for pleural effusion will depend on how severe it is and what's causing it.
